name: Meat Loaf Tropicale
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients except bacon and marmalade.
3. Transfer the mixture to an ungreased loaf pan (9 x 5 x 3 inches).
4. Crisscross the bacon slices on top of the meat mixture.
5. Spread the marmalade evenly over the entire loaf.
6. Bake, uncovered, for 1 to 1 1/4 hours.
7. Allow the meatloaf to rest for 5 to 10 minutes before slicing.
Note: The bananas contribute a unique flavor and moisture to this elegant meatloaf.
